# isNetworkAccessAllowed

**Instance Property**

A Boolean value that specifies whether Photos can download the asset from iCloud.

## Declaration

```swift
var isNetworkAccessAllowed: Bool { get set }
```

## Discussion

By default, the value is `false`. If `true`, Photos downloads the asset for editing if it’s not available on the local device. Use the [doc://com.apple.photokit/documentation/Photos/PHContentEditingInputRequestOptions/progressHandler] property to track the progress of the download.

## Fetching Asset Data from iCloud

- **progressHandler**: A block Photos calls periodically while downloading the asset.
